title: Armor Stand Technoblade Statue Rename
description: Rename and armor stand "Technoblade" to get a statue
body:
This pack is made in tribute to the best minecraft legend Technoblade!
This is a pack is a pack that i made in my free time.
Please consider downloading this.
I will try my best to keep it updated.

**[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (or in optifine but Not Tested) is required for this to work**

![ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a9fe8d33f8dcc4a61abf23919d9c04871f41937.png)
![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49ec6f51f6c09066853ab5cd609d239b16a2394.png)
